name: Bug report
about: Report something that does not work as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear, concise description of the buggy behavior.

## What you expected

What you expected to happen instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

If the bug only appears with a particular image type (RGB / fluorescence / multiplex), please say so. A screenshot of the legend window in the failing state is the single most useful thing you can attach.

## Environment

- QuPath version (Help > About):
- Extension version (visible in the Releases page filename you installed):
- Operating system and version (e.g. Windows 11 23H2, macOS 14.4, Ubuntu 22.04):
- Display setup (single vs multi-monitor; HiDPI scaling factor if not 100%; Wayland yes/no on Linux):
- Java version (only if you built from source; otherwise leave blank):

## Logs and screenshots

If QuPath wrote anything to its log (Help > Show log), paste the relevant lines below. Screenshots of the legend window and of any error message are welcome.

```
(paste log excerpt here, or remove this block)
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might help. If you saw this only after a particular action sequence (image switch, monitor unplug/replug, DPI change), mention it.

---

ASCII-only in pasted log excerpts where possible; the project follows an ASCII-in-code convention and a clean log makes debugging faster.
